allow: Bash(node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>s+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const d=JSON.parse\(s\);const L=d.leagues||[];console.log\('total leagues:',L.length\);for\(const x of L\){const n=\(x.strLeague||''\).toLowerCase\(\);if\(n.includes\('six nations'\)||n.includes\('rugby world'\)||n.includes\('french open'\)||n.includes\('roland'\)\)console.log\(x.idLeague,'|',x.strLeague,'|',x.strSport\)}}\)")

Bash(node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>s+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const d=JSON.parse\(s\);const t=new Set\(\);for\(const e of d.events||[]\){t.add\(e.strHomeTeam\);t.add\(e.strAwayTeam\)}console.log\([...t].sort\(\).join\(' | '\)\)}\)")
PowerShell(foreach \($c in 'choco','scoop','winget'\) { $s = \(Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \($s\) { "$c -> $s" } else { "$c -> absent" } })

description: A foundational project with context-aware development system

orchestrator.policy: Pour toute demande de modification, deleguer a l'agent specialise dont le perimetre correspond (voir agents.routing). Les changements significatifs sont valides par qa-verify ; les changements touchant auth/RLS/endpoints publics/webhooks passent aussi par security-review. L'orchestrateur ne code pas lui-meme dans un perimetre couvert par un agent.

routing.db-supabase: Schema, migrations SQL, policies RLS, triggers, seed, tests SQL de securite (supabase/)
routing.backend-api: Server actions, routes API, logique metier src/lib (spin, jobs, crons, pronostics, emails Resend, rate-limit) hors Stripe
routing.frontend-ui: Composants React, pages App Router, Tailwind 4, roue 3D three.js, Studio creatif, dashboard, parcours joueur
routing.stripe-billing: Stripe : webhooks entrants, abonnements, checkout, billing (src/lib/stripe.ts, subscription.ts, api/stripe/, actions/billing.ts)
routing.qa-verify: Typecheck, lint, tests Vitest, E2E Playwright, build ; ecrit et repare les tests ; valide apres chaque chantier
routing.security-review: Revue securite en lecture seule : isolation multi-tenant, RLS, endpoints publics, webhooks, tokens, crons
routing.docs-scribe: Documentation : docs/, CLAUDE.md, ADR, bugs connus, etat de session .claude/state/

agents.cross_cutting_rule: Une tache qui traverse plusieurs perimetres est decoupee : chaque agent traite sa part, qa-verify valide l'ensemble a la fin.

decision_logging.template: ADR format with date, status, context, decision, rationale, consequences

commit_messages.example: [init] Add project context and memory system
